CVE-2021-38084.title: An issue was discovered in the POP3 component of Courier Mail Ser ...
CVE-2021-38084.summary: An issue was discovered in the POP3 component of Courier Mail Server before 1.1.5. Meddler-in-the-middle attackers can pipeline commands after the POP3 STLS command, injecting plaintext commands into an encrypted user session.
